diff: The Buyback Executor is the entity responsible for receiving excess SubDAO Proxy funds in USDS, purchasing SPK, and returning the SPK to the Spark SubDAO Proxy. Initially, this role will be performed by the Spark Operations Multisig.
description:
Originating forum post: https://forum.sky.money/t/saep-06-subdao-proxy-management-plan/27422

**Do not merge unless associated poll passes**
